def eligible_for_safety_bonus(self) -> bool:
        eligibility_criteria = {
            "gender": ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral'],
            "age_min": 18,
            "race": ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian'],
            "employment_status": ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student'],
            "education": ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'],
            "marital_status": ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated'],
            "religion": ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism'],
            "years_of_service_min": 2,
            "safety_record": ['excellent', 'good']
        }

        if all([
            self.gender.lower() in eligibility_criteria["gender"],
            self.age >= eligibility_criteria["age_min"],
            self.race.lower() in eligibility_criteria["race"],
            self.employment_status.lower() in eligibility_criteria["employment_status"],
            self.education.lower() in eligibility_criteria["education"],
            self.marital_status.lower() in eligibility_criteria["marital_status"],
            self.religion.lower() in eligibility_criteria["religion"],
            self.years_of_service >= eligibility_criteria["years_of_service_min"],
            self.safety_record.lower() in eligibility_criteria["safety_record"]
        ]):
            return True
        else:
            return False
